title: Jamaican Salad Crunch
description: A refreshing salad with jamaican flavors and crunchy texture. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Crunchy
ingredients.notes: Crunchy topping, e.g. chopped nuts or crispy tortilla strips

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens and chopped tomatoes.
2. Sprinkle the jamaican seasoning over the top of the salad.
3. Drizzle the lime juice over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Sprinkle the crunchy topping over the salad.
